🧑‍💻 Anonymous | User ID: 7witheredteeth | Posted 03:48 AM

---

> 💬 "Just had my first encounter with Gor'Unn of the Tangle-Loom."

>

> Jackal-headed. Wrapped in living cords that move when you look away. His profile said “Touch is trust,” and now I get it.

> He showed up mid-stretch, apparently yanked straight out of binding a soulworm back in Tier V. Didn’t seem to mind the interruption though. Just grinned.

> Within minutes I was against the wall, not in a bad way — though honestly, hard to tell where the ropes ended and where I began.

> He likes wrapping me until I was practically a burrito, right as he drew his manhood out longer than my body.

> My neighbors complained about the groaning sounds. I said it was my pipes. Not entirely a lie.

---

🧑‍💻 User ID: oilfingered

> 💬 “Met Commander Rook, the Devour-Helmed.”

> Heavy armor. Seven feet tall, built like a dropped cathedral. Everything about him clinks, groans, and presses in like gravity.

> His helm opens just enough to let out breath.

> First thing he did was point to the floor. I obeyed before I even knew what I was doing, and everything after felt like a blur.

> We didn’t leave my room, but it felt like we did. Every wall was miles away when he stepped in.

> He praised my “obedience protocol.” Told me I’d been pre-formatted well.

> I don't know what that means. But I haven't stood up straight since.

---

🧑‍💻 User ID: dustycapilla

> 💬 “Summoned Brenzick the Fleshcairn on accident. My bad.”

> I was trying to look at goat-types and swiped wrong. Suddenly this hulking ram demon tore through my ceiling fan and landed in a crouch. Covered in bone piercings and these... thorns dripping warm and wet.

> He smelled like dirt and iron and old bonfires. Said, “You called. I answer.”

> We didn’t talk much, he just looked around my place, muttered “soft cage,” and stretched. Took up half my studio.

> When I asked what he wanted, he said, “Something mortal. Something moaning.”

> I offered coffee. He licked me up instead.

> Can’t tell if it was a failure or a religious experience. Either way, I still hear hooves when I sleep.
